description: Jamf Protect Event Collector (from scratch): an XSIAM event collector content integration (isfetchevents/isfetchassets, marketplaces marketplacev2/platform, supportedModules xsiam) with a client-id type-9 credential, generated as the 'Jamf' connector. Exercises the from-scratch scaffold over an event-collector integration with an Automation capability and a Plain auth profile derived from the Jamf client credentials param.
